search_queries_used: site:doh.gov.ae day surgery interpreter language patient education
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for Perioperative interpreter documentation
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for Perioperative interpreter documentation
rejection_reasons: Unverified translation cannot replace a qualified interpreter or patient-specific clinician communication.
The candidate source category "generic consent translation templates" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients needing language or communication support during perioperative assessment, consent, education, or discharge.
setting_applicability: Direct for DoH-licensed day-surgery patient communication documentation; interpreter qualification and consent law remain local.
UAE_applicability: Verified through the DoH V1/2024 standard.
recency_verification: Current DoH V1/2024 standard and ASA 2023 documentation statement were reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer DoH standard was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact DoH section supports understandable communication, interpreter use, written information, questions, and documented education; it does not establish consent adequacy automatically.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports patient-centred explanation, understandable language, interpreter support, written information, questions, and documented education.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Perioperative interpreter documentation; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Language, interpreter identity and qualification, modality, content interpreted, patient understanding, capacity, consent validity, and accessibility requirements remain unsupported.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
